message:
beads: close ft-p2isu (restore process empty cwd)

ft-p2isu (P2 bug, "restore process empty cwd must not resolve to bare cd")
was already fixed by the earlier commit 3b525792 in this session, which
landed both the plan() empty-cwd filter + shell_escape("") -> "''" fix and
the four regression tests pinning the contract. The bead was created while
the fix was in flight and then the author's own focused verification lane
was blocked by an unrelated runtime.rs exit_reason compile error in
another workspace crate — so marking it closed with a reason that captures
both facts so future readers know (a) the fix is landed and (b) the
verification block was NOT on this bead's fix and has nothing further to
do with restore_process.

Close reason verbatim:
  "Already fixed in 3b525792; focused verification was blocked by
   unrelated runtime.rs exit_reason compile error"

No other beads changed in this diff.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
